descriptors.e: received Cannes Lion Heart Award in 2016

factual_points: Blake founded the Social Entrepreneurship Fund in 2015
He has invested in 15 socially-conscious companies
Blake's first business was a campus laundry service
He competed in The Amazing Race with his sister
He received the Cannes Lion Heart Award in 2016
His book 'Start Something That Matters' was a bestseller
caution_flags: Media framing may emphasize philanthropy over business
Focus on achievements may overshadow challenges
title: Blake Mycoskie | TOMS® Founder
